---
description: Review and ensure OWASP compliance for the solution.
---

Use the `agent-owasp-compliance` skill to perform a comprehensive review of the solution.

Start at the root of the repository and review all code, configuration files, and documentation.

Add all review output into a Markdown file.

Named the file using the following date and time stamp format: `yyyy-MM-dd-hh-mm.md` (e.g., `2024-06-01-14-30.md`)

Save the Markdown file in `/code-analysis/owasp-compliance/` directory.
